# ***CASTING CALL***

**LEKEN NY NORSK FILM OG SØKER FØLGENDE:**

**GUTT** - spillealder 12 (10-15 år oppfordres til å søke. Skuespillererfaring og piano ferdigheter er ikke et krav, men et pluss)

**KVINNER OG MENN** - 30-50 år

**MINDRE ROLLER/STATISTER** - alle kan søke

**CREW/BAK KAMERA **- Ønsker du å bidra med noe bak? - ta kontakt!

**HONORAR, TID OG STED:**
Opptak foregår i august/september i Oslo og omegn, fordelt på få dager.
– Hovedroller: honoreres (avtales individuelt).
– Mindre roller/statister: ulønnet, men vi dekker mat og reise, og holder opptaksdagene korte og effektive – vi respekterer tiden din.
Du blir en del av en proff produksjon med erfarne skuespillere.

Send mail til casting@lekenfilm.no med kort om deg og hvorfor du vil være med, og merk emnefelt i mail med:

GUTT/MANN/DAME + ALDER,

eller:

STATIST, CREW eller ANNET

Aktuelle kandidater kalles inn til audition i Juli.

HONORAR, TID OG STED:
Opptak foregår i august/september i Oslo og omegn, fordelt på få dager.
– Hovedroller: honoreres (avtales individuelt).
– Mindre roller/statister: ulønnet, men vi dekker mat og reise, og holder opptaksdagene korte og effektive – vi respekterer tiden din. Du blir en del av en proff produksjon med erfarne skuespillere. 

Spørsmål? Send mail!

Lykke til!

GUTT- SPILLEALDER 12 PIANO FERDIGHETER ER ET PLUSS DAMER & MENN 30-50 ÄR CREW & STATISTER GUTT, DAME, MANN SKRIV MAIL TIL: CASTING@LEKENFILM.NO A.NO MED KORT OM DEG 0G HVORFOR DU ONSKER VARE MED. MERK EMNEFELTMED MED ALDER, EILER CREW, STATIST ELLER ANNET'

items.text:
CASTING CALL!!
Non-union indie short film based in Vancouver, British Columbia.
Around 11 pages long.

Volunteer.
Food and credits provided.

Shooting around August 19-24th 2026.

LOGLINE
It's 1892 in Nova Scotia. Blythe, used to isolation, shifts her time for her new friend she meets, Agatha. Though as she gets to know her through their imaginative play, she realizes her friends dark family history may reveal the truth of their friendship.

CHARACTERS

⭐️Blythe - Lead
18-25 years old
European or African/Black ethnicities

Blythe is a passionate girl, in touch with nature and her textile abilities.
She has dreams of living in the city, though is stuck at her home duties with her mom. She is a caregiver, finds glee and beauty in everything, though her isolation makes it difficult for her to speak up for herself.

⭐️Agatha - Lead
18-25 years old
European ethnicity 

Agatha is a curious girl, as isolated in life as Blythe. Her family lives with a community, running things that would be illegal and viewed as sinister in a regular society. She is intrigued by Blythe and wants to include her in her community. Agatha is devoted, friendly, and offers a commanding presence.

⭐️Mary - Supporting (6 lines of dialogue)
35-55 years old
European or African/Black ethnicities

Stubborn, traditional, blunt, but also caring. She has a lot of responsibility on the farm and taking care of the kids while her husband works as a loyalist.

⭐️Henry - NO DIALOGUE
8-12 years old
European or African/Black ethnicities

Quiet and introverted. Is responsible for his age and respects his mother’s duties.

PLEASE CONTACT jessicabresciani@my.capilanou.ca WITH YOUR HEADSHOT, DEMO REEL AND RESUME IF INTERESTED.

items.text:
We are casting Spanish-speaking actors for A Distancia, an independent Spanish-language short film filming in Los Angeles this fall.

We are currently seeking performers for:

• Leonardo (Male, 20–25)
• Camila (Female, 20–25)

Please swipe through the images below for the full character breakdowns.

Compensation: Deferred based on the successful completion of our crowdfunding campaign. Meals, IMDb credit, and a digital copy of the completed film will be provided.

🎭 Apply at: byosiel.com/casting

📩 Questions: casting@byosiel.com

We look forward to reviewing your submission!

items.text:
Hi everybody,

Does anyone have any movies that are not under active distribution? If so, we hopefully want to interest you in joining the platform. 

FLINK was created to help independent films continue finding audiences long after their festival run or theatrical release cycle has ended. The platform provides a home for films that may no longer have active distribution, as well as titles that are difficult to access through current streaming services and traditional distribution channels.

Filmmakers retain full ownership, set their own pricing and territorial availability, and can remove their films from the platform at any time.

The platform is entirely free to join, with audiences purchasing directly from filmmakers.

We are officially launching live to the public on 21 July 2026. 

If this sounds of interest, I'd be delighted to send over our information pack and answer any questions you may have. Send me an email on klara@flink.movie.

thank you))

Just 3 Places available !

One day intensive screen Master class / Workshop  

Sunday 9th August

10am-5pm

£75

Ages 16+ 

Link to book : https://screenplayacting.com/product/one-day-intensive-screen-masterclass-film-director-andrew-gunn/

Director Andrew Gunn is an accomplished, versatile and highly visual director and optioned screenwriter whose diverse work encompasses premium drama, comedy, TV movies, features films and award-winning short films.
 
Having previously directed some of the most high-profile dramas of recent years, Andrew is currently in pre-production with two independent films, including THE FEARS, produced by Finite Films and KINDRED, produced by BH Movies. Cast to be announced soon.
 
Andrew has had the pleasure of working with some of the UK’s most acclaimed actors including John Simm in the Emmy-winning and BAFTA nominated LIFE ON MARS, Matt Smith, Karen Gillan and Sophie Okonedo in DOCTOR WHO, Imelda Staunton in TV movie CLAY, David Morrissey, Harry Treadaway and Felicity Jones in CAPE WRATH, Mia McKenna-Bruce in GET EVEN, not to mention Olivia Colman, Andy Serkis, Ian Hart, BAFTA Best Supporting Actress Christine Tremarco and regular collaborator Ian Puleston-Davies.
 

Studio 96 Kansas Avenue, Salford, Manchester , Media City, M50 2GZ

Link to book : https://screenplayacting.com/product/one-day-intensive-screen-masterclass-film-director-andrew-gunn/

items.text:
✨ Lights. Action. Adventure. We're casting male performers! ✨

Do you have the confidence, charisma and performance skills to bring legendary characters to life?

As our events continue to grow, we're looking for talented **male performers** to join our amazing team. From superheroes and princes to pirates, dinosaur rangers, holiday favourites and so much more, every event is an opportunity to create unforgettable memories.

Whether you're performing at intimate birthday parties, large-scale events, festivals or something else entirely, no two days are ever the same!

We're looking for performers who:

✨ Are aged 18+
✨ Are reliable, professional and committed
✨ Have fantastic stage presence, confidence and energy
✨ Love performing and interacting with children and families
✨ Have experience in acting, musical theatre, dance, singing, stunts or entertainment (preferred but not essential)

**About the role:**

✨ Paid performance opportunities
✨ Competitive rates of pay
✨ Full training provided
✨ High-quality costumes provided
✨ Perform as a variety of incredible characters including superheroes, princes, pirates, dinosaur rangers, holiday characters and more
✨ Events include birthday parties, private events, stage shows, festivals, community events and much more
✨ Join a friendly, supportive and passionate team

Must be UK based and able to travel.

This isn't just about wearing a costume - it's about becoming someone's hero, inspiring imaginations and creating magical memories that last a lifetime. 💫

If this sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you!

✉️ wishuponastareventsltd@gmail.co.uk

Or message us directly on Facebook:
Wish Upon a Star Events

We can't wait to hear from you! ⭐

#casting #castingcalls #castingcallsuk #performers #parties #entertainment #shows #childrensentertainment #familyentertainment #wishuponastarevents #wishuponastar

If you, or someone you know, would be interested in taking on this exciting role, we’d love to hear from you.

We are thrilled to announce that after a completely SOLD-OUT run at the @shakespearenorthplayhouse They Were All Some Mothers' Sons is officially returning to Liverpool this September!

But first, we need to complete our family. We are officially casting for two vital roles:

Joey – RAF Pilot (m, playing age 18-24)

Rolf Rheinlander – German prisoner (playing age 20-25, able to recite a few lines in German)

Our casting will take place on Wednesday, 15th July 2026 at The Casa, Liverpool. 
 Rehearsals begin in September. Want to be part of this powerful, living history?

For more information or to book an audition slot, email: howl.michael1963@yahoo.co.uk

#LiverpoolTheatre #CastingCall #TheyWereAllSomeMothersSons #LiverpoolActors #TheCasa

items.text:
🇺🇦 WYDARZENIE ODBĘDZIE SIĘ W JĘZYKU UKRAIŃSKIM

Zapraszamy na pierwsze spotkanie nowego projektu Związku Twórczej Młodzieży — MOLODI.STORIES!

To cykl spotkań z młodymi Ukraińcami mieszkającymi w Polsce, którzy odnieśli już sukces w swoich branżach. 🔥

Tym razem porozmawiamy o komercyjnej produkcji filmowej z wyjątkowymi gośćmi:

🎥 Liza Ruda — reżyserka i autorka teledysków. Współpracowała z FAMILY PRODUCTION, SHOOTME, markami BILO, DEICHMANN, TORCHYN, LAMEL oraz z wokalistką Sara James.

📹 Dmytro Zinicz — operator filmowy. Pracował z artystami TVORCHI, THE HARDKISS, Roxie Węgiel, CHIVAS, markami SYDORIA i POLIN Museum, a także realizuje filmy krótkometrażowe.

👗 Anastazja Merenkowa — kostiumografka reklam, teledysków i seriali. Współpracowała z Tiną Karol, Sadsvit oraz markami Apple, Tiffany & Co. i Blik.

Porozmawiamy o tym, jak wygląda praca w komercyjnym production „od kuchni”, przeanalizujemy prawdziwe case studies i będzie okazja zadać naszym gościom własne pytania. 😎

🗓 19.07 | 17:00

📍 Świetlica Wolności Bar

🎟️ Bilety: https://eventmate.app/events/share/molodistories-za-kadrom-komercijnogo-prodaksnu

Do zobaczenia! ✌🏻
items.previewDescription: Запрошуємо на першу зустріч нового проєкту Спілки творчої молоді — MOLODI.STORIES! Це серія зустрічей з українською молоддю в Польщі, яка вже досягла успіхів у своїй сфер...

w dobrej formie

KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Stawka: 1000 zł netto za całość

Chętny Panów zapraszam do wysyłania PILNYCH zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:
1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku
8. Informację kiedy ostatnio grali Państwo w serialu „Gliniarze” 

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM "UNPROVEN" (Vancouver, BC)**

Hello! We're casting two lead roles and several supporting roles for ***Unproven***, an independent narrative short film set over one rainy night in a 24-hour Vancouver laundromat.

The film explores identity, migration, memory, and the fragile line between truth and performance. It is intended for the international festival circuit.

**Expected production:** late Sept/ early Oct 2026

**Non-Union, Volunteer (Meals and Credit provided)**

**Lead Role #1 – ISHAAN (Male, 20–25), South Asian**
Pakistani international student. Intelligent, observant, and quietly guarded. Ishaan is preparing for an asylum claim based on his sexuality, rehearsing a story he hopes will be believed. Beneath his composure lies uncertainty, vulnerability, and a dry sense of humour. Strong English required. Urdu proficiency is welcome but not required.

**Lead Role #2 – AH LONG (Male, 24–30), East Asian**
Hong Kong migrant working in Vancouver. Reserved, emotionally restrained, with a quiet wit. He carries unresolved grief while carefully avoiding conversations about his own past. **Native or fluent Cantonese and strong English required.**

**Supporting role - **FRIEND A (Male, 20–30)

International student. Charismatic, confident, and slightly mischievous. Sparks a conversation that unknowingly changes Ishaan's perspective.* English-speaking.*

**Supporting role- **FRIEND B (Any Gender, 20–30)

International student. Curious, skeptical, and quick to react. Serves as the emotional counterpoint during the dorm conversation.* English-speaking.*

**Supporting roles - SUPERMARKET COLLEAGUES (*Cantonese-speaking*)**

**OLDER MAN (Male, 55–70)**
Long-time Hong Kong immigrant. Friendly and well-meaning, though occasionally dismissive without realizing it.

**WOMAN (Female, 45–65)**
Warm and practical. Tries to ease tension among coworkers.

**YOUNGER COLLEAGUE (Male, 30–40)**
Recently immigrated from Hong Kong. Quiet, weary, and waiting for his immigration status. *Native or fluent Cantonese required.*

**LAUNDROMAT CUSTOMER (Female, 45–70)**

A middle-aged woman quietly folding laundry late at night. No dialogue. A subtle but important presence that grounds the space in everyday reality.

**FAST FOOD CUSTOMERS (Male, 20–40)**

Two ordinary men sharing a quiet moment over a late-night meal. No dialogue. Comfortable with subtle, natural physical interaction.

Previous acting experience is welcome but not required. We are looking for performers with a naturalistic screen presence.

To submit, please send to **unprovenfilm@gmail.com**:
• Headshot
• Resume (if available)
• Demo reel or self-tape (if available)
• Contact information

Thank you!

items.summary:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM "UNPROVEN" (Vancouver, BC)**

Hello! We're casting two lead roles and several supporting roles for ***Unproven***, an independent narrative short film set over one rainy night in a 24-hour Vancouver laundromat.

The film explores identity, migration, memory, and the fragile line between truth and performance. It is intended for the international festival circuit.

**Expected production:** late Sept/ early Oct 2026

**Non-Union, Volunteer (Meals and Credit provided)**

**Lead Role #1 – ISHAAN (Male, 20–25), South Asian**
Pakistani international student. Intelligent, observant, and quietly guarded. Ishaan is preparing for an asylum claim based on his sexuality, rehearsing a story he hopes will be believed. Beneath his composure lies uncertainty, vulnerability, and a dry sense of humour. Strong English required. Urdu proficiency is welcome but not required.

**Lead Role #2 – AH LONG (Male, 24–30), East Asian**
Hong Kong migrant working in Vancouver. Reserved, emotionally restrained, with a quiet wit. He carries unresolved grief while carefully avoiding conversations about his own past. **Native or fluent Cantonese and strong English required.**

**Supporting role - **FRIEND A (Male, 20–30)

International student. Charismatic, confident, and slightly mischievous. Sparks a conversation that unknowingly changes Ishaan's perspective.* English-speaking.*

**Supporting role- **FRIEND B (Any Gender, 20–30)

International student. Curious, skeptical, and quick to react. Serves as the emotional counterpoint during the dorm conversation.* English-speaking.*

**Supporting roles - SUPERMARKET COLLEAGUES (*Cantonese-speaking*)**

**OLDER MAN (Male, 55–70)**
Long-time Hong Kong immigrant. Friendly and well-meaning, though occasionally dismissive without realizing it.

**WOMAN (Female, 45–65)**
Warm and practical. Tries to ease tension among coworkers.

**YOUNGER COLLEAGUE (Male, 30–40)**
Recently immigrated from Hong Kong. Quiet, weary, and waiting for his immigration status. *Native or fluent Cantonese required.*

**LAUNDROMAT CUSTOMER (Female, 45–70)**

A middle-aged woman quietly folding laundry late at night. No dialogue. A subtle but important presence that grounds the space in everyday reality.

**FAST FOOD CUSTOMERS (Male, 20–40)**

Two ordinary men sharing a quiet moment over a late-night meal. No dialogue. Comfortable with subtle, natural physical interaction.

Previous acting experience is welcome but not required. We are looking for performers with a naturalistic screen presence.

To submit, please send to **unprovenfilm@gmail.com**:
• Headshot
• Resume (if available)
• Demo reel or self-tape (if available)
• Contact information

Thank you!

items.text:
**One seat left — The Cinematographer's Workbook **

We've got a single space remaining in our next cohort of The Cinematographer's Workbook, starting **Sunday**.

This is a 14-week practical cinematography course where you'll lead as cinematographer on your own original short film — and crew every other film in the cohort.

**You must be available for all six shoot dates:**
 Saturday 25 July
 Saturday 8 August
 Sunday 23 August
 Sunday 6 September
 Saturday 19 September
 Saturday 3 October

If you can commit to those dates and want to spend 14 weeks getting hands-on with real cast, crew, and kit — this is your spot.

studioforgood.co@gmail.com

ZAGRAJ W FILMIE! STATYSTKI POSZUKIWANE!

Trwają zdjęcia do nowego komediowego filmu dla najbardziej znanej platformy streamingowej!

Szukamy Pań 18-60 lat

Przyjdź na plan i baw się świetnie razem z nami! 

Nie trzeba mieć doświadczenia! Zobacz jak wygląda powstawanie filmu od kulis! 

DATA: 10/07/2026
Plan nocy od około 14:00 
MIEJSCE: Warszawa
STAWKA: 170 zł

ZGŁOSZENIA:
juliacast.kontakt@gmail.com

W TYTULE: JCT KOBIETY NOCNY

W TREŚCI: imię, nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu, miejsce zamieszkania, zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki

items.groupTitle: PRACA w produkcji filmowej - Statyści, Aktorzy, Epizodyści, TFP, NON-PROFIT
items.title: (no title)

items.text:
🎬 Poszukujemy modelki/aktorki do spotu promocyjnego – Wisła. 

Do realizacji spotu promocyjnego poszukujemy modelki/aktorki w wieku ok. 30-35 lat. 

📍 Lokalizacja: Wisła 📅 Termin zdjęć: 17 lipca 2026 (ewentualnie 23.07 lub 24.07)

🎥 Projekt: spot promocyjny. Spot będzie opowiadał historię pary, która przyjeżdża na wypoczynek do hotelu wraz z dzieckiem. Rola bez dialogów. Współpraca płatna. 

📩 Zgłoszenia: Prosimy o przesłanie w wiadomości prywatnej: 

• krótkiej informacji o sobie (wymiary) 

• aktualnych zdjęć (portret + sylwetka) 

• ewentualnie linku do portfolio 

Zapraszamy do kontaktu. Na wszystkie pytania odpowiemy w wiadomościach prywatnych.
items.title:
Z Marcinem spotkaliśmy się aby wykonać wspólnie kilka różnych posmylow, kilka różnych historii, które są przedstawione na fotografiach 🤗 tutaj postawiliśmy na portret w stylu fine-art kadry które pokazują delikatność, kobiecość, klimat oraz skupienie na detalach 🥰 

To nasz drugi projekt z wykonanej sesji 💪

Co sądzicie ? Dajcie znać w komentarzach 🤗

items.summary:
🎬 Poszukujemy modelki/aktorki do spotu promocyjnego – Wisła. 

Do realizacji spotu promocyjnego poszukujemy modelki/aktorki w wieku ok. 30-35 lat. 

📍 Lokalizacja: Wisła 📅 Termin zdjęć: 17 lipca 2026 (ewentualnie 23.07 lub 24.07)

🎥 Projekt: spot promocyjny. Spot będzie opowiadał historię pary, która przyjeżdża na wypoczynek do hotelu wraz z dzieckiem. Rola bez dialogów. Współpraca płatna. 

📩 Zgłoszenia: Prosimy o przesłanie w wiadomości prywatnej: 

• krótkiej informacji o sobie (wymiary) 

• aktualnych zdjęć (portret + sylwetka) 

• ewentualnie linku do portfolio 

Zapraszamy do kontaktu. Na wszystkie pytania odpowiemy w wiadomościach prywatnych.

sharedPost.text:
CASTING / FEATURE FILM / CHINA

We are looking for a girl aged 12–16.

Type: European appearance.

Required: good physical condition, acrobatics / gymnastics / martial arts / Wushu / Karate / Taekwondo / stage combat / stunt training.

Preparation: China. 
Preparation period: early August — early October. 
Shooting period: from October. 
Training: intensive preparation with martial arts masters.

For preliminary selection, please send:

1. Full name;
2. Age;
3. Height;
4. City / country;
5. Recent photos;
6. Video introduction, if available;
7. Video with acrobatics, gymnastics, Wushu, martial arts, stage combat or stunt elements — minimum 2 minutes;
8. Contact of a parent / legal guardian / coach / agent.

Important: minors are considered only through parents, legal guardians, coaches or official representatives.

WhatsApp / Telegram: +998 90 178 15 72

items.text:
**🎥  CASTING CALL OUT 🎥**

We are casting for a short film based on a research project exploring the experiences and emotions of ethnic minority police officers within the police force.

The film is voiceover-led, with the characters’ inner thoughts and feelings heard through narration. We are looking for performers who can convey emotion on screen through natural, grounded and compelling performances.

We are currently casting:

**AISHA**
Asian woman, playing a Constable

**SAMIR**
Asian man, playing a frontline officer

**RODGER**
Afro-Caribbean man, playing a Detective

We are also looking for extras of all ethnicities, so there will be a range of opportunities to get involved.

**Filming:** Week commencing 10th August
**Location:** In and around Leicestershire
**Roles:** Paid

To apply, please email your name, headshot and showreel to: olivia@candegroup.co.uk

items.text:
Hi filmmakers,
I’m always looking to collaborate with talented, thoughtful people who are telling stories that matter. I’ve been fortunate to build a long career as a character actor, working in comedy and drama, in both film and television.  

IMDB: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a5fxXO6bNx8](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a5fxXO6bNx8)

DEMO: [https://www.imdb.com/name/nm0835725/?ref_=fn_al_nm_1](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm0835725/?ref_=fn_al_nm_1) 

At this stage, I’m especially excited by strong scripts, bold directors, and roles that let me bring humanity, humor, and depth to the screen. Please take a look at my demo reel. I’d be grateful for your consideration, and I’d love to connect about the possibility of working together.
items.title: Jason Stuart | Actor, Producer, Writer

items.groupTitle: Casting For Artists&Dancers Travel All Over The World
items.title: (no title)

items.text:
Peace be upon you.
We are a duo residing in the Kingdom of Bahrain. I play the oud and my friend plays the organ.
We perform a variety of musical styles, including Tarab, Moroccan, Gulf, Rai, Lebanese, and Iraqi.
We are looking for work in a hotel in one of the Gulf countries.

items.text:
🎬 🚨 CASTING CALL – WORTH IT ALL HIP HOP MUSICAL FEATURE FILM 

STORY 4 IS SHOOTING IMMEDIATELY! 🚨

Do you want to be in a movie? No acting experience or talent is required! Just show up ready to participate—we're looking for real people to bring these characters to life.

NOW CASTING:

🎭 DEON (Rapper a Plus)

* Male
* Ages 30–45
* Adam's uncle

🎭 BECCA

* Female
* Ages 18–25
* If you're up 28 but can convincingly play younger, we want to see you too!

📍 Filming Location: Gary, Indiana

📲 To Be Cast Immediately:
TEXT "MOVIE" TO 2192004322

Don't miss your chance to be part of Story 4, which is filming right away. Whether you've never acted before or have experience, you are encouraged to apply!

#CastingCall #NowCasting #GaryIndiana #IndianaActors #NoExperienceNeeded #NoTalentRequired #JustShowUp #MovieCasting #FilmOpportunity #HipHopMovie #Story4 #IndependentFilm #SupportIndependentFilm #BackgroundActors #NewFacesWanted #ActorLife #CastingNow #FilmInIndiana #BeInAMovie #ChanelJJackson

items.text:
We’re Looking for New Guests for our 
LIVE PODCAST EPISODE 4: BELIEVE IT!

Monday, July 13th,
7 PM PST / 10 PM EST
(Please check your local times)

Do you have a story that sounds too unbelievable to be true? We want to hear it.
We're looking for guests from all walks of life to share their stories, talents, and experiences.

To be considered, please email:
“Guest”
Icantmakethisupodcast@gmail.com

Include:
• Your name
• A short bio
• Your story or topic
• Any social media or website links

If selected, we'll send you a guest waiver and all the details you'll need to join the show.

Follow us:
Instagram: @icantmakethisupodcast✨

items.text:
Casting call
Hello, my short film "Metropolitan Night Units" is looking for an actor for "Michael"

- Gender: Male

- Ethnicity: East Asian Heritage (Korean preferred, but opened to any East Asian heritage. Mixed okay)

- Age: 20 - 30

- Height: min 5ft 9 (178cm)

- Accent: London / South London accent

- Filiming date / Location : end of September, London

If you are interested, please send introduction and headshot to team.metnightunits@gmail.com

This is paid gig.

items.title: Casting call

items.text:
My name is Jahmai Jones!!!
I’m the next best upcoming Actor! I’d love the opportunity to prove it! By any means! TAKE A CHANCE ON ME! 

Dm me or reach out to me if you have any available roles! Especially lead roles! I can play any role!

Sag Eligible

Email: jahmaihand98@gmail.com

#: 336-558-3146

instagram: Instagram.com/jahmaitjones 

D/O/B: 3/4/1998 (28 years old)

Race: African American 

Acting experience: 2 1/2 years 

Height: 5’9

Weight: 180 pounds 

Shirt: M

Sleeve: 32

neck: 14.5

pants: 32x32

hat: 7 3/8

tattoos visible but willing to paint over them

Willing to cut and dye hair

Willing to get paint/ makeup over tattoos: yes 

Location: Greensboro, NC

Imdb: Jahmai Jones
https://pro.imdb.com/mobile/name/nm12361753/?ref_=ext_shr_lnk

Articles and magazines:

https://thrivetimes.us/jahmai-jones-hollywoods-rising-powerhouse/

https://artviews.gr/o-amerikanos-ithopoios-jahmai-t-jones-protagonistei-sti-mikrou-mikous-tainia-tis-ellinidas-katerinas-sigala-me-titlo-red-

Resume/Bio about me:

I am a 2x Award winning lead actor

I have landed 86 roles with 80 of them being main character/lead roles in movies and shows (50 shown on imbd so far) that are currently production/or finished. I am currently top 28k rated on IMDb as well. These movies and shows will be premiering on NETFLIX, tubi , primevideo, Apple TV , peacock , paramount plus , Hulu , starz and one film headed to theaters and more! My debut movie “Forever loved” has over 3 MILLION VIEWS WORLDWIDE ON ALL PLATFORMS combined. My other leading role titled “Glistening in the snow” is currently on peacock and i’ve won an award for BEST LEADING MALE ACTOR IN FILM for this project! Also my leading role in the movie “Crossing the line” was #1 Recommended in the world on tubi for 2 weeks straight! I also won Best Actor Award for my leading role in the movie “Red Nit” That’s premiering soon. 

Here are some auditions of mine 

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/10HZUJxb35fIw2mJ0BYuRDZHLuAB5uv4P

Here are clips of me acting 

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1259FqA_PipOC-GmQDWS8HjE4nrAI-rFC

I know I can show you great things! I’d love to prove it !!! My goal is to win an Oscar one day! 🏆

items.text: Just 3 places available!!

sharedPost.text:
Just 3 Places available !

One day intensive screen Master class / Workshop  

Sunday 9th August

10am-5pm

£75

Ages 16+ 

Link to book : https://screenplayacting.com/product/one-day-intensive-screen-masterclass-film-director-andrew-gunn/

Director Andrew Gunn is an accomplished, versatile and highly visual director and optioned screenwriter whose diverse work encompasses premium drama, comedy, TV movies, features films and award-winning short films.
 
Having previously directed some of the most high-profile dramas of recent years, Andrew is currently in pre-production with two independent films, including THE FEARS, produced by Finite Films and KINDRED, produced by BH Movies. Cast to be announced soon.
 
Andrew has had the pleasure of working with some of the UK’s most acclaimed actors including John Simm in the Emmy-winning and BAFTA nominated LIFE ON MARS, Matt Smith, Karen Gillan and Sophie Okonedo in DOCTOR WHO, Imelda Staunton in TV movie CLAY, David Morrissey, Harry Treadaway and Felicity Jones in CAPE WRATH, Mia McKenna-Bruce in GET EVEN, not to mention Olivia Colman, Andy Serkis, Ian Hart, BAFTA Best Supporting Actress Christine Tremarco and regular collaborator Ian Puleston-Davies.
 

Studio 96 Kansas Avenue, Salford, Manchester , Media City, M50 2GZ

Link to book : https://screenplayacting.com/product/one-day-intensive-screen-masterclass-film-director-andrew-gunn/

items.text:
Letzte Chance dabei zu sein!
Offenes Jurycasting im Kloster Graefenthal in Goch

Die Suche nach neuen Talenten geht weiter!

Du begeisterst mit deiner Stimme, deiner Tanzperformance, Artistik, Comedy oder einem anderen außergewöhnlichen Talent? 

Dann nutze jetzt die Gelegenheit und präsentiere dein Können unserer Jury. 

Ganz gleich, ob Anfänger oder Bühnenerfahrung wir freuen uns auf alle Talente.

Jetzt: Sonntag, 12. Juli 2026

12:00 bis 18:00 Uhr

Kloster Graefenthal

Maasstraße 48–50

47574 Goch

Bitte bringe Folgendes mit:

• Gute Laune und Freude an deinem Auftritt

• Bei Gesang, Tanz oder Comedy: einen USB-Stick mit deinem Playback

• Musiker und Bands: eigene Instrumente, Verstärker und benötigte Anschlüsse

• Artisten und Akrobaten: alle für den Auftritt erforderlichen Requisiten

• Minderjährige können nur in Begleitung eines Erziehungsberechtigten teilnehmen.

Spontan teilnehmen? Kein Problem!

Eine vorherige Anmeldung ist nicht erforderlich. Du kannst einfach vorbeikommen und dich direkt vor Ort für das Jurycasting anmelden.

Wer sich seinen Platz bereits im Voraus sichern möchte, kann sich bequem online registrieren.

Online-Bewerbung & weitere Informationen:

www.evctalentcastingshow.de/bewerbung

Kennst du jemanden mit einem besonderen Talent?

Dann markiere die Person in den Kommentaren oder teile diesen Beitrag. 

Vielleicht beginnt genau an diesem Sonntag der Weg bis ins große Finale der EVC Talent Casting Show 2026.

Wir freuen uns auf einen abwechslungsreichen Casting-Tag und viele beeindruckende Talente!

JULI.2026 2026 VON 12:00-18:00 UHR IM KLOSTER GRAEFENTHAL MAASSTRABE.48-5 47574 GOCH UPPA KLOSIER GRAEFENTHAL GRAEF ENTHAL'

DANCER OPEN CALL for Awakening at Wynn Las Vegas

*It is not necessary to submit your information before attending an open call*

Las Vegas on Monday, July 27, 2026
Millennium Dance Complex Las Vegas
6675 South Tenaya Way, suite 120
Las Vegas, NV 89113

Men at 10:00a, sign in at 9:30a
Ladies at 11:30a, sign in at 11:00a

Final Callbacks Will Be Held On Tuesday, July 28 in Las Vegas

Please bring a hard copy of your headshot/resume
Please wear form-fitting clothing, no baggy clothes
Flat shoes/sneakers please- ladies please also bring heels

21+ only please

This is a non-union production

We are now casting  for our touring   Autumn show Viva Las Vegas .

The show is a musical  show featuring songs  of Sinatra, Judy Garland , Fred Astaire And Ginger Rogers  as well; as songs from Top Hat,  Easter Parade, The Wizard Of Oz  and more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 24th -28th August  

Playing Dates- 31st  August  -30th October

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are offering 700.00 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel  to info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

items.text:
Hello! Dan Bell Casting is casting Multi-Generational Latinx/Hispanic families for a national commercial.

Must be located in Los Angeles and native Spanish speakers! 

Please email us for self-tape audition instructions at danbellcastingoutreach@gmail.com.

SAG Commercial - (Pays each person approx. $830/day)

Auditions: ASAP

Fitting: 7/26/26-7/27/26

Shoots: 7/28/26-7/31/26

Location: Los Angeles, CA

Criteria:

1. Married Couple/Parents Ages 38-50

2. Two children ages 10-18 

3. An uncle/aunt ages 38-50

4. Their child (the cousin) ages 15-20 

5. One Grandparent ages 60-75

items.text:
There isn’t a handbook for raising a young performer but there is a lot to learn along the way! 🎭

Whether your child is attending their very first audition or already has professional experience, the industry can feel exciting, rewarding... and sometimes overwhelming.

That’s why we’ve put together a few reminders we believe every parent should know.

✨ Success isn’t just about booking the job.
✨ Keeping profiles and materials up to date matters.
✨ Most importantly, helping your child continue to love performing is the greatest success of all.

Behind every young performer is a parent, guardian or family member cheering them on, driving them to rehearsals, learning new industry terms and celebrating every milestone, big or small!

We hope this carousel helps you feel a little more informed and a little more supported on that journey.

💬 What’s one piece of advice you wish you’d been given when your child started performing?

📌 Save this post for whenever you need a reminder, and share it with another parent navigating the industry.

COMMENT ‘SELF TAPE GUIDE’ and we will send you our free guide 🤩

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of child and text that says 'KEEP YOUR CHILD'S PROFILE UP TO DATE. Headshots. Height. Playing age. Skills. → Children grow quickly and their profile should grow with them too!'
May be a graphic of text that says 'chorey SUCCESS ISN'T MEASURED → BY BOOKINGS. Confidence. Resilience. Creativity. Enjoyment. These are are just as important.'
May be a graphic of ‎text that says '‎cho Chi chorry pips ciees יחות 4 THINGS EVERY PARENT OF A YOUNG PERFORMER SHOULD KNOW cherrypipsacting.co.uk‎'‎

May be a graphic of text that says 'YOUR CHILD'S AGENT IS YOUR TEAMMATE. Keep them informed about: .Holidays •School commitments → •New skills Appearance changes Communication helps them submit your child for the right opportunities.'

May be a graphic of text that says 'LEARN HOW to SELF-TAPE. SELF- ΓΑΡΕ. Many first-round auditions now happen from home, so creating a simple self-tape setup is a valuable skill. Message us and we will send you our FREE SELF-TAPE GUIDE for for and young performers. parents'

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CALLING ALL FILMMAKERS & SCREENWRITERS! 🎬

The 3rd Annual AMT International Film Festival is accepting submissions! We are bringing the magic of independent cinema right to the heart of the world: Times Square, NYC from October 22nd – 25th, 2026. 🗽✨

To celebrate 🇺🇸Independence Day🇺🇸 we’re giving you our biggest discount of the season.

🔥 FOURTH OF JULY SPECIAL: 50% OFF! 🔥
Get a massive 50% off your submission fee this weekend only. Don’t wait until the regular deadlines—lock in your entry now for half the price!

PROMO CODE: JULYWEEKEND50

DEADLINE: This offer expires on Monday, July 6th at midnight!

🎥 What We Are Accepting:
We want to see your unique voice, regardless of the budget or style. We are accepting all genres across the following categories:

✨ Feature Films

⏱️ Short Films

📹 Documentaries

🎨 Animation

🤖 AI Films

📝 Feature Screenplays

✍️ Short Screenplays

Whether you have a gripping drama, a mind-bending sci-fi, a stunning doc, or a cutting-edge AI project, AMT is your stage.

Ready to screen in Times Square? Head over to FilmFreeway now, submit your project, and use code JULYWEEKEND50 at checkout! 🎟️

#AMTFilmFest #IndieFilm #Filmmakers #Screenwriting

Join our July/August Acting Classes and get hands-on experience, coaching, professional footage for your demo reel! You'll also receive valuable industry agent connections! All in a fun and supportive environment. 🎬

items.text:
Narodowy Teatr Edukacji im. Adama Mickiewicza we Wrocławiu zaprasza na rozmowy sezonowe MĘŻCZYZN, chętnych do udziału w spektaklach naszego Teatru, realizowanych w sezonie 2026/27. 

Poszukujemy zarówno uzdolnionych amatorów, jak i aktorów z wykształceniem kierunkowym (AST, Studium Teatralne, Szkoły Artystyczne ROE, Szkoła Aktorska LART itp.)

Przedstawienia będą grane na terenie całego kraju - od września bieżącego roku, do czerwca 2027.

WYMAGANIA:

- wiek:  18 – 40 lat

- dyspozycyjność

- dobry stan zdrowia

- mile widziane dodatkowe umiejętności - wokalne i taneczne

OFERUJEMY:

- zatrudnienie na sezon w formie umowy-zlecenia/umowy o dzieło w ustalonym wymiarze (2,3 lub 4 tygodnie w miesiącu)

- gwarancję pracy (działamy nieprzerwanie od ponad 25 lat)

- elastyczny czas pracy

- atrakcyjne zarobki

- opcję ubezpieczenia zdrowotnego

- możliwość osobistego rozwoju artystycznego w profesjonalnym zespole teatralnym

- ambitny repertuar teatralny (głównie klasyka polska i europejska)

- okres prób do spektakli (sierpień-połowa września, WROCŁAW) dodatkowo gratyfikowany

Powyższa oferta dotyczy oddziału siedziby głównej Teatru we Wrocławiu.

Zgłoszenia i CV prosimy wysyłać do Dyrektora Artystycznego Marzenny Kucmer-Kołeńskiej na adres:

 teatr.zgloszenia@gmail.com

🎬 CASTING CALL – NON-UNION ACTORS
Vancouver Film School is casting for its upcoming supernatural horror-comedy short film:

GIRL MATH

We are currently casting for the following roles:

🌶 PETUNIA (Female, playing age 16–18 | 18–25 to apply)

📚 MISS NOCTIA (Female, playing age 45 | 35–50 to apply)

🏡 VICKY (Female, playing age 45 | 35–50 to apply)

📍 Greater Vancouver Area

🎥 Shoot Dates: August 8–9, 2026

🎭 Non-Union

💰 Unpaid (craft services & catering provided)

To submit, please send:

• Headshot

• Resume

• Demo Reel (if available)

📩 girlmath.production@outlook.com

⏰ Self-tape deadline: July 19, 2026

🎬 Callbacks: July 21, 2026

Please indicate which role you are submitting for in your email.

🎬 **CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM**

**TITLE:** Short Film Edmonton

**LOCATION:** Edmonton, Alberta, Canada

**SHOOT DATES:** Early August 2026 (TBD) — 4-day shoot

**PAID, UNPAID OR PROFIT SHARE:** Paid

**HOW TO APPLY:** Visit https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls for casting details.

Casting for a paid, non-union short film shooting in Edmonton, Alberta. The production is seeking Nepali actors based in Canada for two lead roles exploring themes of loneliness, connection, and resilience.

Non-union. Nepali actors based in Canada are specifically sought for both roles.

🎭 **ROLES**

**DIPEN – Lead**

Male | 25–30

• Nepali actor required

• An intelligent and caring architect who hides his loneliness behind routine and cooking

• After a life-changing cancer diagnosis, he must confront the emotional wounds he has avoided for years

**ANJALI – Lead**

Female | 20–25

• Nepali actor required

• A bright, ambitious intern who brings energy, optimism, and a fresh perspective into Dipen's life

🎥 **Details**

• Paid short film — non-union

• Location: Edmonton, Alberta, Canada

• 4-day shoot — Early August 2026 (dates TBC)

• Nepali actors based in Canada sought for both roles

📩 **HOW TO APPLY**

Apply via Actors & Extras as a Talent PRO member with a 1-month FREE trial:

➡️ https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls

Know someone in Edmonton who should see this? Share it.

However, we strongly encourage all applicants to exercise due diligence and independently verify the details of the project before proceeding.*

items.text:
SINGING LESSONS - VOICE PROJECTION LESSONS FACE TO FACE AND ONLINE.
I’m a professional vocal coach based in Cambridge, with a conservatoire background and many years of experience as a trained opera singer. I’ve had the opportunity to work with international performers and bring that same level of coaching to my students locally and online.

I offer private singing lessons for both children and adults, either face to face or online.

For children and teens, lessons focus on:

• Building confidence and enjoying singing

• Improving vocal range and control

• Learning proper breathing and projection

• Preparing for auditions or ABRSM exams

For adults, I also offer voice coaching for:

• Singing development

• Public speaking and presentations

• Improving clarity and projection

I work with all levels, from complete beginners to more experienced singers, and tailor each lesson to the individual.

If you’d like to see examples of my work, there are videos and more information on my website below.

Happy to answer any questions or have a quick chat to see if it’s a good fit.

📍 Cambridge (also online available)

📞 07854 924209

📧 sebarotti@yahoo.com.ar

🌐 sebastianembrel.co.uk

items.text:
Hello,

I am looking for an actor (male- 55-65 years old) to play Edward, a respected, slightly guru-ish, singer/songwriter in a short feature (60mins approx.) shooting in London for two days in October and Portland, Dorset for two days in November this year.

The plot- Eve, a woman in her 60s, living in her mother's house (her mother has died) in Portland in a fairly chaotic manner- drinking, making the odd bit of art without a definite purpose. When she was younger she was in a band with her then partner Edward who has gone on to be a respected, successful, slightly 'guru-ish' singer/ songwriter. He comes to visit her out of the blue when he is touring nearby and they talk. 

That's sort of the whole plot. The drama is in the conversation and the tension between their worldviews, probably you could say particularly about creativity. 

Paid (£500 flat rate). More details below. Please get in touch if you are interested. If I have forgotten any important info please ask.

topComments.text: Hi James, will send you a message ￼

attachments.ocrText: May be a black-and-white image of text that says "CAST CALL (Paid)- For EXPOSURE, a short Edward, a successful and respected musician, returns to his home town to visit his former feature (50 mins) girlfriend and collaborator Eve. There follows a series of discussions of relationships, art, pain, £,500 flat fee witchcraft, ambition and dangerous spirits set against the awesome coastline. Edward- Male- 55-65 years Shooting 2 days in London Oct & 2 days in Portland, Dorset, UK, November 2026 Contact Jamie at- jamielynchpost@gmail.com WhatsApp: 07581905947 DiegeticPictures"

When she was younger she was in a band with her then partner Edward who has gone on to be a respected, successful, slightly 'guru-ish' singer/ songwriter. He comes to visit her out of the blue when he is touring nearby and they talk. 

That's sort of the whole plot. The drama is in the conversation and the tension between their worldviews, probably you could say particularly about creativity. 

Paid (£500 flat rate). More details below. Please get in touch if you are interested. If I have forgotten any important info please ask.

items.title: Hi All,

items.text:
**Casting call**

Looking for **football fans based in London** to appear in short branded documentary film about the World Cup. We’re especially looking for people who have a **strong personal connection to football** beyond simply supporting their team. We want people with a real story, point of view and confidence on camera.

**We’re looking for fans who support:**

🇪🇸 SPAIN

🇧🇪 BELGIUM

🇫🇷FRANCE

🇲🇦 MOROCCO

🇳🇴 NORWAY

🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿ENGLAND

🇦🇷ARGENTINA

🇨🇭SWIZERLAND

** Filming details**
* You must be based in **London**
* You must be available for filming **16th July 2026**
* Paid opportunity + free football jersey too!

 If that sounds like you, or someone you know, please get in touch with ***producerizzy.casting@gmail.com***

topComments.text: Just emailed, I’m an England football team fan, thanks

items.text:
CASTING CALL – LEAD ROLE (ITALIAN SPEAKER)

A STRANGE DAY (SHORT FILM)

We are currently casting the lead role for A Strange Day, an independent short film developed between Germany and Italy and intended for international film festivals.

Looking for a young Italian football player—or someone who could convincingly be one—for the lead role

This project is fully self funded by the crew members so unfortunately this is an UNPAID role

ROLE: GUIDO CAPPELLI

Male | Playing Age 16–20

Guido is a 17-year-old Italian football player participating in an international youth tournament in Germany.

While his teammates focus on winning, Guido gradually becomes fascinated by the mysterious forests surrounding the sports complex. What begins as curiosity slowly turns into a journey through adolescence, imagination, isolation and self-discovery.

We are looking for someone with a natural screen presence and emotional authenticity rather than extensive acting experience.

REQUIREMENTS

✓ Fluent Italian speaker (required)

✓ Playing age 16–18

✓ Athletic build

✓ Football experience is welcome but not essential

✓ Strong expressive presence on camera

✓ Based in Berlin, or in nearest areas of Germany

ABOUT THE FILM

A Strange Day is a mystery inspired by youth football culture, personal memories, and the visual tradition of Italian Giallo cinema.

The film explores a universal feeling many people experienced growing up: the moment when you begin to drift away from the group around you and start searching for your own place in the world.

SHOOTING

Germany, Berlin

1-5th August 2026

TO APPLY

Please send:

•⁠  ⁠Headshot

•⁠  ⁠Recent photos

•⁠  ⁠Age and city where you based now

•⁠  ⁠Acting experience (if any)

•⁠  ⁠Football experience (if any)

Subject:

GUIDO CASTING – Your Name

Contact:

Hannahrynevich@gmail.com

CASTING CALL – LEAD ROLE (ITALIAN SPEAKER)

A STRANGE DAY (SHORT FILM)

We are currently casting the lead role for A Strange Day, an independent short film developed between Germany and Italy and intended for international film festivals.

Looking for a young Italian football player—or someone who could convincingly be one—for the lead role

This project is fully self funded by the crew members so unfortunately this is an UNPAID role

ROLE: GUIDO CAPPELLI

Male | Playing Age 16–20

Guido is a 17-year-old Italian football player participating in an international youth tournament in Germany.

While his teammates focus on winning, Guido gradually becomes fascinated by the mysterious forests surrounding the sports complex. What begins as curiosity slowly turns into a journey through adolescence, imagination, isolation and self-discovery.

We are looking for someone with a natural screen presence and emotional authenticity rather than extensive acting experience.

REQUIREMENTS

✓ Fluent Italian speaker (required)

✓ Playing age 16–18

✓ Athletic build

✓ Football experience is welcome but not essential

✓ Strong expressive presence on camera

✓ Based in Berlin, or in nearest areas of Germany

ABOUT THE FILM

A Strange Day is a mystery inspired by youth football culture, personal memories, and the visual tradition of Italian Giallo cinema.

The film explores a universal feeling many people experienced growing up: the moment when you begin to drift away from the group around you and start searching for your own place in the world.

SHOOTING

Germany, Berlin

1-5th August 2026

TO APPLY

Please send:

•⁠  ⁠Headshot

•⁠  ⁠Recent photos

•⁠  ⁠Age and city where you based now

•⁠  ⁠Acting experience (if any)

•⁠  ⁠Football experience (if any)

Subject:

GUIDO CASTING – Your Name

Contact:

Hannahrynevich@gmail.com

items.text:
CASTING CALL - SHORT HORROR FILM (Pennsylvania)
Hey all!
My name is Colby Killian and I am a senior from Lycoming College. For my thesis film, I aim to create a roughly twenty-minute long narrative psychological horror short that will premiere at a festival on Lycoming College's campus this coming fall.
Synopsis: Radius of a Soul follows June Seymour, a young woman who frequently suffers dissociative thoughts relating to the mysterious disappearance of her closest friend, Nova Chalmers. To commemorate Nova on the anniversary of her disappearance, June and her friends, Max and Larry, have planned to share memories over dinner. Although they have all burdened this loss, June has experienced the most turmoil with her grief which Max and Larry refuse to understand. When the dinner is cut short due to disagreement, June has to decide whether to follow the haunting visions of Nova or believe the friends that don’t support her.
Currently, I am audition for all roles, most of which are in the 22-30 age range. Character breakdowns and age specifications below.
June Seymour- (woman age range 22-28 years old ~ 29 speaking lines) A young woman who lives alone despite her need for codependency. She struggles deeply with the disappearance of her best friend Nova Chalmers, believing Nova was the only one truly capable of understanding and supporting her. This has left her obsessive and desperate for similar connections, but her life only gets increasingly frustrating when she cannot find that. She has intrinsically tied herself to Nova, leaving her spiraling down a path of self-destruction.
Zircus- (man age range 25-50 years old ~ no speaking lines) A supernatural, animalistic life form with mysterious motives. Zircus originally existed only as a make-believe creature both June and Nova created when they were kids, but now has materialized into an entity beyond horror. Zircus has a strange attraction to June; the torment it brings her, the more its hold on her tightens.
(Note: This role will require the use of cosmetics. Please be aware of this if interested.)
Larry Holland- (man age range 22-28 years old ~ 33 speaking lines) June’s hotheaded and unemployed friend whose only concern in any situation is how it will benefit him first and foremost. Larry is wrapped up in his own careless lifestyle, but his immaturity and unwillingness to see things from a different perspective only serve to further draw a wedge in his and June’s relationship.
Maxwell Evans- (man age range 22-28 years old ~ 11 speaking lines) Another of June’s friends who oftentimes finds himself acting as a mediator between Larry and June, though keeping a front of indifference as to not further escalate conflict. As a family man, he gives all of his time and attention to his wife and child, frequently leaving himself emotionally exhausted and unenthusiastic to be there for June.
Nova Chalmers- (woman age range 22-28 years old ~ 4 speaking lines) June’s closest friend and supporter, whose disappearance haunts every aspect of June’s everyday life. Since vanishing, Nova’s likeness has been reduced to bait for June to unwittingly follow, luring her further into Zircus’s trap.
Filming is currently planned to take place sometime in mid-late July, primarily on weekends. Additionally, our main shooting locations are all located in Williamsport, Pennsylvania, I am very flexible and am open to discussions pertaining the schedule, transportation, etc. Lastly, this will be paid positions. I will get a clearer estimate on what pay will be as I continue to structure the budget.
If you have any questions, please feel free to reach out at kilcolb@lycoming.edu. Alternatively, you may also reach me at (607)-358-0854.
Thank you for your time!
#auditions #castingcall #shortfilm #film #Pennsylvania

American Playlist Theater is bringing The Holiday Radio Theater Extravaganza to the Garrison Playhouse in Rollinsford, New Hampshire, and we're looking for talented actors, musicians, and filmmakers/videographers to join our holiday production team!

This production features:

  Three original holiday radio plays

  Two holiday readings

  Live sound effects

  Live music

  Plenty of laughs

  A whole lot of Christmas spirit!

Performance Dates:

  December 4–6 & December 11–13, 2026

 Auditions

  Wednesday, August 26, 2026

  6:00 PM – 8:30 PM

 Garrison Playhouse, Rollinsford, NH

 No radio theater experience? No problem! 

If you love storytelling, music, or capturing the magic on camera, we'd love to meet you.

Interested? Contact Sean Sullivan at:

  sullivansean3535@gmail.com

Come help us bring Radio Theater to life this Christmas!

Hi everyone,
I’m Nanda, a Berlin-based Fashion, Beauty & Portrait Photographer with over 15 years of experience. I’m currently looking for opportunities in Photography, Photo Retouching/Editing, or Social Media Content Management anywhere in Germany.

I have about 4 months left on my Opportunity Card (Chancenkarte) and will be applying for an extension at the end of this month. A job in my field would also help me transition to a German work visa.

At the moment, I’m working part-time in a German restaurant while actively searching for a creative role.

If you know of any openings or can refer me, I’d truly appreciate your support.

🌐 Portfolio: https://nandasphotography.com

📸 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nanda.prophotographer

✨ Fashion & Beauty: https://www.instagram.com/eurofashion.nanda

Thank you so much! 🙏

items.text:
So kommst du in die Medien - Pressearbeit für Künstler:innen.

Im KÜNSTLERFAMILIE Themen-Talk mit Eva Primavesi am Mo 20. Juli 2026 (14-15 Uhr) dreht sich alles um die Sichtbarkeit in der Presse, was es bringt und wie man es in die Medien schafft.

PR-Expertin Eva Primavesi spricht darüber, wie Künstler:innen gezielt in die Medien kommen und sich eine starke öffentliche Präsenz aufbauen können. Sie zeigt, warum Pressearbeit kein Zufall ist, sondern eine strategische Entscheidung – und wie du sie für dich nutzen kannst, auch ohne Journalistenkontakte oder PR-Agentur.

Du erfährst unter anderem

▪️ warum Medien Sichtbarkeit verstärken und Türen öffnen
▪️ wie du deine Geschichte so erzählst, dass Journalisten aufmerksam werden
▪️ welche häufigen Fehler Künstler:innen in der PR machen
▪️ und wie du konkret ins Tun kommst, um erste Medienkontakte aufzubauen

Der Talk richtet sich an Künstler:innen, die bekannter werden, ihre Arbeit promoten und professionell sichtbar werden möchten.

Für KÜNSTLERFAMILIE-Mitglieder ist die Teilnahme am digitalen LIVE-Video-Talk kostenlos.

🙂 Noch nicht bei KÜNSTLERFAMILIE dabei?

Jetzt kostenlos registrieren ➡️ https://kuenstlerfamilie.com/registrieren

Fotocredits: Thomas Hofmann / Christian Ariel Heredia

items.summary:
So kommst du in die Medien - Pressearbeit für Künstler:innen.

Im KÜNSTLERFAMILIE Themen-Talk mit Eva Primavesi am Mo 20. Juli 2026 (14-15 Uhr) dreht sich alles um die Sichtbarkeit in der Presse, was es bringt und wie man es in die Medien schafft.

PR-Expertin Eva Primavesi spricht darüber, wie Künstler:innen gezielt in die Medien kommen und sich eine starke öffentliche Präsenz aufbauen können. Sie zeigt, warum Pressearbeit kein Zufall ist, sondern eine strategische Entscheidung – und wie du sie für dich nutzen kannst, auch ohne Journalistenkontakte oder PR-Agentur.

Du erfährst unter anderem

▪️ warum Medien Sichtbarkeit verstärken und Türen öffnen
▪️ wie du deine Geschichte so erzählst, dass Journalisten aufmerksam werden
▪️ welche häufigen Fehler Künstler:innen in der PR machen
▪️ und wie du konkret ins Tun kommst, um erste Medienkontakte aufzubauen

Der Talk richtet sich an Künstler:innen, die bekannter werden, ihre Arbeit promoten und professionell sichtbar werden möchten.

Für KÜNSTLERFAMILIE-Mitglieder ist die Teilnahme am digitalen LIVE-Video-Talk kostenlos.

🙂 Noch nicht bei KÜNSTLERFAMILIE dabei?

Jetzt kostenlos registrieren ➡️ https://kuenstlerfamilie.com/registrieren

Fotocredits: Thomas Hofmann / Christian Ariel Heredia
items.title: So kommst du in die Medien - Pressearbeit für Künstler:innen.

sharedPost.text:
RE PHEITHILE ART PRODUCTION IS EXPANDING
 
“Where There Is No Art, A People Die Inside.” 

NEW BRANCHES NOW OPEN IN YOUR TOWN!

Young Creatives of the Free State — This is YOUR moment!

Re Phethile Art Production is growing. We are bringing art, culture & opportunity out of the cities and into your kasi, your school, your community. 

“Art is not a luxury. It is the oxygen of the soul.”

We are now officially recruiting in:
  
✨️Bethlehem
✨️Qwaqwa
✨️Paul Roux
✨️Reitz
✨️Vrede
✨️Senekal
✨️Clarens
✨️Fouriesburg
✨️Rosendal
✨️Lindley  
✨️Kestel
✨️Botshabelo
✨️Petrus Steyn
✨️Brandfort

Additional branches will be announced soon. Youth in other towns, contact us directly to request a branch in your area.

If you live for:
💃🕺Dance
 🎭 Drama
 🎶  Music
🎬 Film  
✍️ Storytelling
🎙Poetry 
🌍 Culture   
📝🖌✏️ Visual Arts
🪘👏 Gwijo & Acappella 

Then build with us.Let’s bring the kasi to life and revive Art & Culture where it matters most. 

“A nation that does not tell its own stories will be told by others.”

EVERYONE IS WELCOME 

All races, all backgrounds — Black, Coloured, Indian, and White youth. Art has no boundaries, only possibilities.

---
HOW TO JOIN:

WhatsApp “JOIN” to 081 750 9746 with:  
1.  Name & Surname  
2.  Age & Gender 
3.  Town 
4.  Recent Picture 

Be part of the movement. Be part of the legacy.
  
Please SHARE this with every young creative you know ✨ 

#RePhethileArt #FreeStateCreativeEconomy #ArtRevival #YouthInArts #KasiToTheWorld

Reviving the Kasi: Why Re Phethile Matters Now” 

There was a time when every kasi had a theatre group, a dance crew practicing on dusty tar, and a choir that could make your chest vibrate. Culture was not something we watched on TV. It was something we lived. 

Today, many of our young people have talent, but they do not have a stage. They have stories, but no microphone. They have dreams, but no structure. That is why Re Phethile Art Production is expanding.

Re Phethile means “we have done it” in Sesotho. It is a declaration. It is a promise that we will not wait for opportunity to come to us. We will build it, town by town, branch by branch. 

From Bethlehem to Botshabelo, Qwaqwa to Clarens, Reitz to Brandfort — we are opening doors. Not just for dancers, actors, or musicians. But for every young person who believes that art can change a life, and a community. 

“If you can dream it, you can stage it.”This is the heartbeat of our work. We believe that poetry can heal, drama can teach, dance can unite, and film can document our truth for generations. 

We welcome every race, every language, every background. Because art does not ask where you come from. It asks what you are willing to create. 

To the youth of the Free State: This is your moment. Do not let it pass you by. WhatsApp us. Show up. Bring your voice, your body, your ideas. We will do the rest together. 

Be part of the movement. Be part of the legacy. 

A re tsoeleng pele ka bonono le setso. Forward with Art & Culture.

I just submitted to the Sofia Coppola Film Award on the Discentralized pictures platform! Please,review and vote for my project“ English Class”
👇🏼

https://app.decentralized.pictures/project/6a4334191d202e3c740af799

I shot this excerpt as my pitch video on 16mm in only one day in DTLA. The story follows an immigrant — Mira, who gets triggered by her only friend’s innocent lie, which forces her to confront the roots of her fragile mental state. 
I would gladly appreciate your help, and if you’re a filmmaker who participates too, please let me know and I will support you back! 🤍

items.text:
*Actors required for*
Gritty TV drama series 

Paid work
From September- May 2027

For casting details, please message 07300 561627 

 *BRIEF SYNOPSIS* 
It all started last year, may, after the city splash event in brockwell Park, Brixton, South London. I'm Stephanie, a normal down to earth black girl who loves looking good wearing lots of makeup and my favourite pair of jeans. One food i can't live without is jerk wings, omg. My bestie Maria is a bit different from me, though, you could say she is the bad cop.

It was around 12.42am Maria and I rolled up to the gas club on Brixton road, there were so many people waiting to get in, but we knew the security on the door, so we were escorted inside very quickly. We even met some celebrities, the music and vibes were lit, to make it even better, Asif & Trevor bought us lots of drinks. All I could think about is why cant I get rich to be able to live like those people around us, but riches comes with a price right?

If i remembered correctly, about 3.26am, I went to the bathroom. When I came out, i wasn't feeling well. All I could hear was, Stephanie, are you ok?  I went outside for some fresh air,  but all I just saw were  flashing lights, people screaming and lots of police with firearms..

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

sharedPost.text:
Having so much fun on Mondays! This might look a bit tricky if you've never danced before but I promise you this is a BEGINNERS class! Completely welcoming, completely aimed at "Come and have a go!!" We dance because we enjoy it, because it's good for us. Not for perfection. 👌 And you'll get a great workout in the process. Come and find your new favourite thing to do! These guys are 3 sessions in and haven't looked back.

#danceliverpool #adultclass #trysomethingnew #britneyspears #MoveMore

📣 ACTOR CALLOUT 🥂

Please follow the link below to submit your lovely self-tapes, as well as to find the audition pack:

items.text:
CASTING CALL – IN PERSON AUDITIONS THIS WEEKEND
Original Play: *THE RULES TO SABOTAGE YOUR LIFE"

This is a heartfelt, unpaid passion project driven by our love for theatre and the valuable experience it provides. We're also excited about the possibility of taking it to Broadway if it turns out great!

Melbourne Actors Collective is casting for an exciting original stage play and we are looking for talented actors aged **30–60** to join the production.

📍 Location: Beach House, St Kilda
📅 Auditions: Saturday & Sunday
⏰ Time: 10:00 AM – 1:00 PM
🎥 Self-tapes accepted too
📧 Email: melbourneactorscollective@gmail.com

Come along, drop by, and be part of an amazing new play. You can also email us to request the script or send through your self-tape.

Characters we are casting!!

Fanny | 30–50 | she/her
A witty, dynamic woman full of contradictions, humour, vulnerability and risk-taking energy. A writer and performer with sporadic career success, divorced twice, flawed, magnetic and uniquely sexy.

Jane | 30–50 | she/her
Fanny’s older sister. Religious, stoic, a teacher, married with young children, and always there to pull Fanny out of crisis. She loves Fanny deeply, even when trying very hard not to judge her.

Bradley | 30–50
Fanny’s best friend since their early 20s. A talented chef, empathic, sweet, funny and a dreamer. Loves a good party. Gay, warm-hearted, and terminally single.

Max | 30–50
Charming, successful and powerful on the surface, but hiding a manipulative and abusive personality. A Jekyll-and-Hyde presence whose darker nature slowly reveals itself.

Narrator | Any age / Any gender
A supreme storyteller and raconteur who can inhabit multiple characters, break the fourth wall, and guide the audience through the “rules that will sabotage your life.”

✨ For more information, message us or email: Amanda or Nawab on : melbourneactorscollective@gmail.com

We would love to hear from passionate, bold and committed performers.
Come audition and help bring this powerful original play to life.

items.text:
Calling all Performers and creatives in the Herts, Essex and London area! - whether thats YOU or someone you know! Summer holidays are almost here, this is a great chance to sell/fill your classes, 1-2-1’s and workshops either over the break or ready for September!

I work for TalentCoach – a new, free, up and coming platform that connects skilled teachers to learners. We’re looking to work with a small number of artists/aspiring teachers across the performing arts sector. This includes acting, singing, dance, LAMDA, public speaking, circus, aerial, puppetry, instruments, music theory and more! 

It’s down to you when and how you work, whether that be 1-2-1 sessions or group workshops, with children or adults – you’re in charge. 

If this is something that interests you then comment below or send me an email at rachel@talentcoach.com

Alternatively, create your profile via this link below!:

We’re looking for talented Nepali actors to join an upcoming web series based on real experiences.

No prior acting experience required. Freshers are encouraged to apply.

items.title: Hello all,

items.text: Just 3 places available!!!!

sharedPost.text:
Just 3 Places available !

One day intensive screen Master class / Workshop  

Sunday 9th August

10am-5pm

£75

Ages 16+ 

Link to book : https://screenplayacting.com/product/one-day-intensive-screen-masterclass-film-director-andrew-gunn/

Director Andrew Gunn is an accomplished, versatile and highly visual director and optioned screenwriter whose diverse work encompasses premium drama, comedy, TV movies, features films and award-winning short films.
 
Having previously directed some of the most high-profile dramas of recent years, Andrew is currently in pre-production with two independent films, including THE FEARS, produced by Finite Films and KINDRED, produced by BH Movies. Cast to be announced soon.
 
Andrew has had the pleasure of working with some of the UK’s most acclaimed actors including John Simm in the Emmy-winning and BAFTA nominated LIFE ON MARS, Matt Smith, Karen Gillan and Sophie Okonedo in DOCTOR WHO, Imelda Staunton in TV movie CLAY, David Morrissey, Harry Treadaway and Felicity Jones in CAPE WRATH, Mia McKenna-Bruce in GET EVEN, not to mention Olivia Colman, Andy Serkis, Ian Hart, BAFTA Best Supporting Actress Christine Tremarco and regular collaborator Ian Puleston-Davies.
 

Studio 96 Kansas Avenue, Salford, Manchester , Media City, M50 2GZ

Link to book : https://screenplayacting.com/product/one-day-intensive-screen-masterclass-film-director-andrew-gunn/

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - PAID PHOTOSHOOT - LONDON**

Looking for a male model for a charity photoshoot about homelessness, pets and hot weather.

Age range: roughly 20–50
**Must have your own dog:**
Dog must be calm, comfortable around people and suitable for an outdoor shoot environment

**Shoot date: week commencing 13 July**

Time: TBC - day/ early evening

Shoot length: around 3–4 hours

Fee: £80

Location: London - exact location TBC

Casting: Male 

The shoot will involve staged, sensitive scenes representing someone sleeping rough in hot weather.

The tone will be natural, respectful and realistic.

**Please message me with:**

Name

Recent photos of you 

Photo of your dog

Age
Location
Availability week commencing 13 July

topComments.text: Would this not be better if you found a willing genuinely homeless man?
80 pound for 4 hours. Far too low. What about usage details etc.

items.text:
Hi, beautiful people! 💜

I'm hoping to tap into this amazing community for a connection.

Does anyone know a photographer in the Colorado Springs area who might be interested in donating their time for a very special local nonprofit event?

In October, Angels of America's Fallen is hosting a small, exclusive theatrical Halloween runway experience at Garden of the Gods benefiting children and families of fallen military service members and first responders. We’re hoping to capture the incredible costumes, red carpet moments, and the magic of the evening while helping raise awareness for an organization that provides long-term support to children of our fallen heroes.

We’re looking for a photographer who may be willing to donate some time to capture professional photos of the event. In return, they would receive recognition on social media, the opportunity to showcase their work, and the chance to be part of an unforgettable evening supporting an amazing cause.

If you know someone who might be interested—or if that's you!—I’d love to connect. Please comment below or send me a message.

Thank you so much! 🖤🎃✨

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING CALL | LEAD ROLE**

Hello! We're excited to begin casting for our next short film, ***Surprise!***, a psychological thriller.

The last project we cast through Facebook acting groups, ***Esperando***, premiered at the **Sonoma International Film Festival **this year and continues its festival run. We're excited to return to this community in search of another talented actor to join us on our next production.

We're currently casting the lead role:

**MARCUS**
• Male
• Mid to Late 20s (Early 30s welcome)
• Any ethnicity

Marcus is thoughtful, charismatic, and easy to like on the surface, but beneath that exterior is someone whose perception of reality has become dangerously distorted. We're looking for an actor who can seamlessly transition between warmth, vulnerability, and quiet menace.

**Production Details**
📍 Denver or Colorado Springs, CO (TBD)
🎥 2–3 shoot days during the first two weeks of October (Exact dates TBD)
🎬 Non-Union
✨ Meals provided, IMDb credit, and footage for your demo reel

Previous film acting experience is preferred, but all qualified actors are encouraged to submit.

Additional information can be found in the submission form below. If you're interested, please complete the form to be considered for the role.

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScQrHFspsTa9R2eBD470XtYgBikI4WQ8RlsWfbaH-rjsEbgOQ/viewform

If you know someone who would be a great fit for Marcus, we'd greatly appreciate you sharing this post. We look forward to reviewing your submissions!

sharedPost.text:
Zum Nachhören 

Der Sommer lädt vielerorts ein, um die eigenen Lieblingsfilme in gemütlicher Atmosphäre bei kühlen Getränken und kleinen Snacks outdoor zu geniessen.

Wie für eine Movietime üblich gibt es auch Interviews.  Meryl Streep und Stanley Tucci reden nicht bloss über Mode, sondern über die Dreharbeiten zu DER TEUFEL TRÄGT PRADA II

Das Cinema Paradiso bringt in seiner 25. Sommerkino Spielzeit den St Pöltner Rathausplatz zum cineastischen Erstrahlen. Sarah Fuchs präsentiert Ihnen die Highlights der ersten beiden Wochen und konnte außerdem mit dem Geschäftsführer des Cinema Paradiso, Alexander Syllaba, ein Interview führen.

items.text:
So kommst du in die Medien - Pressearbeit für Künstler:innen.

Im KÜNSTLERFAMILIE Themen-Talk mit Eva Primavesi am Mo 20. Juli 2026 (14-15 Uhr) dreht sich alles um die Sichtbarkeit in der Presse, was es bringt und wie man es in die Medien schafft.

PR-Expertin Eva Primavesi spricht darüber, wie Künstler:innen gezielt in die Medien kommen und sich eine starke öffentliche Präsenz aufbauen können. Sie zeigt, warum Pressearbeit kein Zufall ist, sondern eine strategische Entscheidung – und wie du sie für dich nutzen kannst, auch ohne Journalistenkontakte oder PR-Agentur.

Du erfährst unter anderem

▪️ warum Medien Sichtbarkeit verstärken und Türen öffnen
▪️ wie du deine Geschichte so erzählst, dass Journalisten aufmerksam werden
▪️ welche häufigen Fehler Künstler:innen in der PR machen
▪️ und wie du konkret ins Tun kommst, um erste Medienkontakte aufzubauen

Der Talk richtet sich an Künstler:innen, die bekannter werden, ihre Arbeit promoten und professionell sichtbar werden möchten.

Für KÜNSTLERFAMILIE-Mitglieder ist die Teilnahme am digitalen LIVE-Video-Talk kostenlos.

🙂 Noch nicht bei KÜNSTLERFAMILIE dabei?

Jetzt kostenlos registrieren ➡️ https://kuenstlerfamilie.com/registrieren

Fotocredits: Thomas Hofmann / Christian Ariel Heredia

Spots are limited.

#CastingOttawa #Activewear #WomensSportswear #ModelingOttawa #CastingCanada

items.text:
**E-Castings entscheiden heute oft darüber, ob du im Recall bist oder direkt den Job bekommst – oder eben nicht.**

In den letzten Monaten durfte ich den** E-Casting-Crashkurs** der **Media Impact Academy** bereits mehrfach exklusiv für **Models **und **Darsteller*innen** innerhalb ihrer Agenturen durchführen.

Das Feedback war so positiv, dass wir den Workshop jetzt auch für alle öffnen.

In dem Crashkurs geht es nicht darum, wie man "schöner spielt". Es geht darum, wie du vor der Kamera wirklich ankommst.

Wir arbeiten unter anderem an:
• deiner Präsenz vor der Kamera
• Stimme, Körpersprache und Wirkung
• authentischem Spiel mit Haltung statt "Vorspielen"
• den häufigsten Fehlern bei E-Castings
• technischen Basics, mit denen dein Casting sofort professioneller wirkt

Das Ganze ist sehr praxisorientiert. Wir drehen, analysieren und optimieren direkt vor Ort.

Der Crashkurs geht ca. 8 Std. und findet in Seminarräumen in Hamburg statt.

Ein paar **authentische Rückmeldungen** von Teilnehmer*innen haben mich besonders gefreut:

*„Hallo Achim, ich hoffe, es geht dir gut. *

*Ich wollte dir von meinen Fortschritten nach dem Workshop berichten. Ich war zweimal auf die Shortlist für ein paar Castings, und beim letzten habe ich sogar die Zusage bekommen. Heute hatte ich das Shooting – und das alles innerhalb eines Monats! Wahnsinn! Ich bin total begeistert und habe alles, was du uns beigebracht hast, konsequent geübt." *

*„..der Kurs war sehr hilfreich, um zu erkennen, wo ich meine Performance verbessern kann. Deine technischen Tipps zur Vorbereitung auf Castings sind definitiv sehr wichtig für ein optimales Ergebnis. Mir hat besonders gefallen, dass die Gruppe klein ist, sodass man sich individuell konzentrieren und gleichzeitig die Videos der anderen ansehen kann, um die Interaktion mit der Kamera zu optimieren. Ich nehme viele Tipps mit und hoffe, sie bei zukünftigen Castings anwenden zu können.“*

*"Ich fand den Crashkurs sehr wertvoll, um alte „e-Casting-Schalen” endlich mal platzen zu lassen. Darunter kam viel Neues zum Vorschein. Das war nicht nur irre, bei sich selbst zu erleben, sondern auch bei den anderen Teilnehmerinnen. Du hast das richtige Fingerspitzengefühl und eine besondere Kreativität, um auf jeden Charakter und Typ individuell einzugehen. Man hat nie Sorge, sich zu blamieren.“*

Da wir bewusst in kleinen Gruppen arbeiten, legen wir die Termine jeweils nach den eingehenden Anmeldungen fest. Wenn du Interesse hast, melde dich einfach unverbindlich bei mir. 

Sobald genügend Anmeldungen zusammengekommen sind, erhältst du die nächsten Termine.

Schreib mir einfach eine PN oder hinterlass einen Kommentar – dann schicke ich dir weitere Infos.

Ich freue mich auf euch!

**Achim Bramscher**
Media Impact Academy Hamburg

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'MEDIA IMPACT ACADEMY HAMBURG ዕየቅ1 人 MEDIA MEDIAIMPA IMPACT ACADEMY info@media-impact-academy.com www.mediaimpact-academy.com'

Ein paar **authentische Rückmeldungen** von Teilnehmer*innen haben mich besonders gefreut:

*„Hallo Achim, ich hoffe, es geht dir gut. *

*Ich wollte dir von meinen Fortschritten nach dem Workshop berichten. Ich war zweimal auf die Shortlist für ein paar Castings, und beim letzten habe ich sogar die Zusage bekommen. Heute hatte ich das Shooting – und das alles innerhalb eines Monats! Wahnsinn! Ich bin total begeistert und habe alles, was du uns beigebracht hast, konsequent geübt." *

*„..der Kurs war sehr hilfreich, um zu erkennen, wo ich meine Performance verbessern kann. Deine technischen Tipps zur Vorbereitung auf Castings sind definitiv sehr wichtig für ein optimales Ergebnis. Mir hat besonders gefallen, dass die Gruppe klein ist, sodass man sich individuell konzentrieren und gleichzeitig die Videos der anderen ansehen kann, um die Interaktion mit der Kamera zu optimieren. Ich nehme viele Tipps mit und hoffe, sie bei zukünftigen Castings anwenden zu können.“*

*"Ich fand den Crashkurs sehr wertvoll, um alte „e-Casting-Schalen” endlich mal platzen zu lassen. Darunter kam viel Neues zum Vorschein. Das war nicht nur irre, bei sich selbst zu erleben, sondern auch bei den anderen Teilnehmerinnen. Du hast das richtige Fingerspitzengefühl und eine besondere Kreativität, um auf jeden Charakter und Typ individuell einzugehen. Man hat nie Sorge, sich zu blamieren.“*

Da wir bewusst in kleinen Gruppen arbeiten, legen wir die Termine jeweils nach den eingehenden Anmeldungen fest. Wenn du Interesse hast, melde dich einfach unverbindlich bei mir. 

Sobald genügend Anmeldungen zusammengekommen sind, erhältst du die nächsten Termine.

Schreib mir einfach eine PN oder hinterlass einen Kommentar – dann schicke ich dir weitere Infos.

Ich freue mich auf euch!

**Achim Bramscher**
Media Impact Academy Hamburg
items.title: **E-Castings entscheiden heute oft darüber, ob du im Recall bist oder direkt den Job bekommst – oder eben nicht.**

items.text:
STATISTER SØGES TIL DANSK SUPER8 SPILLEFILM - BYLDERUP-BOV (ULØNNET)
Vi søger statister til at agere landbrugsmedarbejdere til en dansk spillefilm som bliver optaget nær Bylderup-Bov. 

Optagelserne finder sted;

Søndag d. 12.. Juli kl 19:00 - 23:30

Mandag d. 13. Juli kl 11-21

Vi søger:

5-8 statister 

Alder: 40+

Køn: underordnet

Der vil være forplejning under optagelserne. 

Erfaring er ikke nødvendig, så længe man har gåpåmod og en sund interesse i at gøre vores film så god som muligt.

Er du interesseret, eller kender du én, som kunne være? Så send en mail til mig med:

- Navn

- Alder

- Telefonnummer

- Et vellignende billede af dig selv

Til mail: lv.studie@gmail.com

Jeg glæder mig at høre fra jer!

Mvh Lauge Visgaard - Produktionsassistent

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget, Fantasy - Horror Spielfilm Großprojekt (Kinoformat), (die Dreharbeiten sind im vollen Gange, und zu 95% abgedreht) suchen wir noch Darsteller für kleinere Rollen, aber auch Komparsen, für Ritter, Dorfbewohner, Räuber. Ihr habt Zeit und Lust dabei zu sein, dann schickt uns eure Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie eure Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße an: harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt per Messenger an Harlekin Filme. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald.

Viele Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team
